compiled_state.title: validate.sh test-batched interaction causes stale interrupted state across sessions

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC). Root cause: test-batched.sh resumes interrupted tests as 'completed' (skips them), leaving stale interrupted state that blocks validate.sh across sessions. Fix: filter interrupted tests from COMPLETED_LIST on resume so they're re-run.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed in commit 57eca700: test-batched.sh now filters interrupted results from COMPLETED_LIST when loading state, so interrupted tests are re-run on next invocation rather than skipped as already-complete.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
